title: Xtra Fluffy Vietnamese Malt Che Ba Mau
description: A malty, fluffy, and cozy Vietnamese dish featuring enchilada sauce and leaf-wrap-steam, low-calorie-friendly and perfect for a snack. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional Che Ba Mau.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine malt syrup, enchilada sauce, and coconut milk, and whisk until smooth.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together tapioca starch and salt.
Gradually add the starch mixture to the saucepan and whisk until the mixture thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the water and egg.
Cut the banana leaves into large squares and place a spoonful of the malt mixture onto the center of each leaf.
Fold the leaves over the filling to form a square package and steam for 10-12 minutes.
Serve the Che Ba Mau hot, garnished with additional malt syrup if desired.
